messages.content: I need HW1 done. Sarah-Michelle sent her attempt. Pull the Canvas export and let's get through all 5 questions.

Pulling from Canvas now. Got the ACF course export plus Sarah-Michelle's 4-page handwritten scan from your Downloads.

Organized everything into theke/chrematistike/sp26/acf/ — articles, class notes (capital structure, info risk mgmt), homework/hw1, admin.

Here's where Sarah-Michelle landed and what needs correction:

Q1 Arbitrage: Her approach on Q1b is wrong. You can't fix the ownership fraction change after deleveraging by borrowing alone — you need to buy 5 shares and borrow $40 simultaneously. The arbitrage profit is $50.

Q2 Prop II graphs: She did graphs only with no equations. I'm building formula-driven charts in Excel.

Q3 G&T 14.2/14.3: She got this right. The price is $0.95 before announcement and $1.00 after — the math holds.

Q4 Senior debt claim dilution: She got this right too. Firm value stays at $200 throughout.

Q5 Diversification and spin-offs: Her answers to Q5c and Q5d are cut off, incomplete.

Building the full Excel workbook now with formulas for all 5 questions and embedded charts for Q2. Nothing hardcoded.
Good. Make sure everything is formula-driven, not hardcoded. That's the standard going forward.

Excel is done — Johnson_HW1_ACF.xlsx. Five sheets: Q1 Arbitrage, Q2 Prop II, Q3 G&T 14.2/14.3, Q4 Senior Debt, Q5 Diversification. All formulas, embedded charts on Q2 with the two Prop II curves. Nothing hardcoded anywhere.

Saved to theke/chrematistike/sp26/acf/homework/hw1/.

One minor note from Sarah-Michelle's Q3: she wrote 'Miss=$800' but the math is $80. Typo — her work is correct otherwise.
Can you get it to me? Eiron isn't responding in Signal.

Syn relayed it. You have the file — Syn confirmed delivery. The session hit 127K tokens and the gateway was timing out on the sessions_send relay. That's why Eiron went quiet. The file was built and ready before the timeout.

facts: ACF Homework 1 has 5 questions covering M&M arbitrage, Prop II graphs, G&T 14.2/14.3, senior debt claim dilution, and diversification/spin-offs
Sarah-Michelle's Q1b approach is wrong — corrected to buy 5 shares and borrow $40, not borrowing alone
Q3 price is $0.95 before announcement and $1.00 after
Q4 firm value stays at $200 throughout
Sarah-Michelle's Q5c and Q5d answers are cut off and incomplete
Sarah-Michelle's Q3 has a typo: wrote Miss=$800 but the correct value is $80, math is correct
The completed Excel workbook is at theke/chrematistike/sp26/acf/homework/hw1/Johnson_HW1_ACF.xlsx
Eiron's session hit 127K tokens and the gateway timed out on sessions_send relay
Syn relayed the HW1 file directly to Alice via Signal after Eiron's session timed out
decisions: Excel with formulas (not hardcoded values) is the standard for homework going forward
contradictions: Sarah-Michelle's Q1b approach (borrow alone) is wrong; correct approach is buy 5 shares and borrow $40 simultaneously after deleveraging

metadata.notes: Sourced from eiron/memory/2026-02-09.md and syn/memory/2026-02-08.md — ACF HW1 completion and Eiron timeout relay via Syn
